headline: Six films to watch this week
summary: Zendaya and Robert Pattinson star in buzzy romantic thriller ‘The Drama’; a Hollywood star opens up in ‘Kim Novak’s Vertigo’; London bomb scare meets heist in ‘Fuze’; Naples magnificently portrayed in ‘Pompei: Below the Clouds’; Kafkaesque logic in Stalin-era drama ‘Two Prosecutors’; biography meets 21st-century anxiety in ‘Orwell: 2+2=5’. Reviews by Danny Leigh & Jonathan Romney
